violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. Information available during inspection indicated that food manager's certification expired in February 2026. Facility must have a certified food manager.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Trays with cooked chicken wings were found in the walk-in cooler uncovered. Food items should be protected from contamination.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Chest freezers in the upstairs storage area were found with tape covering the insulation on the lids. Equipment should be maintained in good repair and should be easily cleanable.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Inside of the ice machine was found dirty. Ice machine should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single use kid's cups were found stored on the floor of the upstairs storage area. Single use items should be stored off of the floor.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
